title: cordia curassavica
intro: Cordia curassavica, also known as the Mexican plum or yellow mombin, is a tropical tree native to Central and South America, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and edible fruit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cordia curassavica include its potential to reduce fever, treat diarrhea and dysentery, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cordia curassavica is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be used as a topical application for skin conditions and wounds.
